paper.title: Developmental cell programs are co-opted in inflammatory skin disease

snippets: In both AD and psoriasis, LC1 has the highest enrichment of cell cycle genes
LC1 are enriched within the Langerin+CD1aloCD11clogate distinct from Langerin+CD1ahi LCs

The clusters at the convergence of these branches (moDC3, LC4 and migratory DC (Mig. DC)) express transcripts associated with DC maturation (CD83, CCR7, LAMP3, CD40, CD86), immunoregulation (CD274, IDO1, CD200, PDCD1LG2, SOCS1) and migration (FSCN1, PLGRKT, TRAF1, BCL2A1, CFLAR and REL)
relevance: primary source: LC cluster annotations and LC1 FACS gate enrichment

paper.title: HIV transmitting mononuclear phagocytes; integrating the old and new

snippets: Recent single cell transcriptomic analysis of the human stratified squamous epithelium has suggested that LCs exist as multiple subsets; two at steady state termed LC1 and LC2, an activated subset defined by high CD83 and low CCR7 expression termed LC3, and a migratory subset defined by high CCR7 expression termed LC4
Of the two steadystate LCs, LC1 were delineated as classic LCs while LC2 were described as a novel and unique subset of LC
relevance: secondary source: LC1-4 subset definitions from Liu et al. 2021
